task_completion.description: The agent opened the GIS application (gvSIG).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main window of a GIS application (such as gvSIG) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent loaded the source rivers shapefile into the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A layer named 'ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines' is visible in the layer panel (Table of Contents) or its geometries are rendered in the map view.

task_completion.description: The agent opened the tool or dialog used for exporting or reprojecting the layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for 'Export', 'Save As', 'Reproject', or 'Geoprocessing' is open and actively targeting the 'ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines' layer.

task_completion.description: The agent selected EPSG:32633 (WGS 84 / UTM zone 33N) as the target coordinate reference system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CRS selection within the export/reproject dialog clearly shows 'EPSG:32633', '32633', or 'UTM Zone 33N' selected for the output.

task_completion.description: The agent specified the correct output path for the reprojected shapefile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog or export tool shows the output file path configured as '/home/ga/gvsig_exports/rivers_utm33n.shp'.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS graphical user interface to perform the reprojection rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GIS application's menus and dialogs. There should be no terminal window executing command-line GIS tools like 'ogr2ogr'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GIS software rather than mocking the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GIS interface is fully visible with the map canvas, layer tree, and proper tool dialogs, rather than just a file manager or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy and rename the original file without reprojecting it.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of the CRS selection dialog (EPSG:32633) during the export process, proving a reprojection was actually configured.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source layer path: /home/ga/gvsig_data/rivers/ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp. Target layer path: /home/ga/gvsig_exports/rivers_utm33n.shp. Target CRS: EPSG:32633 (WGS 84 / UTM zone 33N). The task must be performed using the GIS software GUI.
